query:
-- Insert knowledge entries
INSERT INTO knowledge (title, content, category, tags, source, sourceType) VALUES
('Semantic Similarity vs Lexical Matching', 'Lexical matching fails with synonyms. Use OpenAI embeddings with cosine similarity. Thresholds: <0.5 Low (60), 0.5-0.7 Moderate (80), 0.7-0.85 Good (90), >0.85 Excellent (100). Impact: Quality 82→91.', 'Quality Assessment', '["semantic-similarity","embeddings","quality"]', 'MOTHER v7.0 Audit', 'learning'),
('Vite Build-Time Variables', 'Vite replaces import.meta.env.VITE_* STATICALLY during build. Solution: Create .env.production, update .dockerignore to allow it.', 'Deployment', '["vite","docker","deployment"]', 'Production Debugging', 'learning'),
('Complexity Baseline', 'Short queries got 0.00 complexity. Solution: Add 0.15 baseline for all queries. Impact: 0.00→0.15-0.40.', 'Intelligence Layer', '["complexity","routing"]', 'Log Analysis', 'learning'),
('System Prompt Engineering', 'Incomplete prompts cause generic responses. Include: Identity, Response Protocol, Quality Standards, Context, Relevance emphasis (45% weight). Impact: Relevance 60→80.', 'Prompt Engineering', '["system-prompt","quality"]', 'God+ Analysis', 'learning'),
('OpenAI Embeddings Endpoint', 'Correct: /v1/embeddings (NOT /embeddings). Model: text-embedding-3-small (1536 dims, $0.02/1M tokens).', 'API Integration', '["openai","embeddings","api"]', 'Error Debugging', 'learning'),
('tRPC Async Pattern', 'When middleware becomes async, all callers must await. TypeScript error if not awaited.', 'TypeScript', '["typescript","async","trpc"]', 'Implementation', 'learning'),
('Cloud Run Best Practices', 'Create Artifact Registry first. Permissions: Registry Writer + Cloud Run Admin. Region: closest to users. Build time: 6-7min.', 'Cloud Deployment', '["gcloud","cloud-run","docker"]', 'Deployment Experience', 'learning'),
('Scientific Debugging Method', '8 steps: Define, Collect, Hypothesize, Analyze, Design, Implement, Test, Document. Prevents random fixes, ensures reproducibility.', 'Methodology', '["debugging","scientific-method"]', 'Meta-Analysis', 'learning');
